name: Dantsu Flames - Enough
description:
“Never Had I Dreamt Too Big.”

“Yet.”

“You’re The One Who Made Me Dream.”

DANTSU FLAME.

“Even though there's a lot of amazing Umamusume, I'll be the star of the show one day! ... I mean, it'll be nice if that happens....”

Dantsu Flame is a good-natured Umamusume who often goes along with the whims of others. Although not extremely confident in herself, she works very hard in the hopes that she can run in races forever. Because Dantsu Flame can be easily swayed, she is usually pushed around by her unique peers.

Extra

“T-This Is Curren’s Idea! She..she told me this will “sways” your..resolve!”

Notes

Welll i got Curren wedding and diamond, So they’ll come next, How havve yall been doin?
creator: Unidentifiable
